title: Remove deprecated scorecards push command and dangerous --all path

comments.author: derek
comments.text: Implementing source change to remove  CLI entrypoint entirely, including , and updating tests/docs so the path cannot be accidentally used.

comments.author: derek
comments.text: Implementing source change to remove the scorecards push CLI entrypoint entirely (including the all-scope option), and updating tests/docs so this path cannot be accidentally used.

comments.author: derek
comments.text: Completed implementation in working tree: removed the scorecards push command and all related implementation paths from plexus/cli/scorecard/scorecards.py; updated dashboard docs examples to remove scorecards push usage. Validation: `python -m py_compile plexus/cli/scorecard/scorecards.py` passes; `python -m plexus.cli scorecards --help` no longer lists push; `python -m plexus.cli scorecards push --help` now returns `No such command "push"`.
